segment.source: Renders a horizontal breadcrumb navigation from a manually maintained list of entries, each with label and optional link; the last entry shows as the plain-text current page, with schema.org BreadcrumbList markup and an accessible nav label. Use it for: orientation on deep subpages, hierarchical paths like Home > Section > Page. Prefer 'Steps Navigation' for progress through a process, 'Table of Contents Navigation' for in-page anchors.
